subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Thou didst hearken unto My call when thou wert present before Me, and didst witness the surging waves of the Ocean of Mine utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد قد سمعت ندائی اذ کنت حاضرا فی محضری و رایت امواج بحر بیانی و ارتفاع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat]
